testCases.title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations Returns Confirmed Location Regardless of keyword/filter/paging (VCST-4707)
failedAssertions: [ERRORS label=set_shipment_pickup] errors[] empty — actual: JSON_READER error from addOrUpdateCartShipment
[DATA label=set_shipment_pickup] data.addOrUpdateCartShipment.id is non-null — actual: null
[DATA label=query_keyword_exclude] data.cartPickupLocations.items.0.id = LAST_LOCATION_ID — actual: undefined (items=[] because shipment not confirmed)

[DATA label=query_paged_small] data.cartPickupLocations.items.0.id = LAST_LOCATION_ID — RUNNER FALSE-NEGATIVE: actual value (3e77a4dc) equals expected but runner marked FAIL (note text in assertion string causes comparison mismatch)
testCases.notes: BUG-050k-001 fix PARTIALLY WORKED: LAST_LOCATION_ID capture is now non-empty (3e77a4dc-46af-41f5-bac5-012a6fec19a7 = 'Colinborough' via sort:desc). However addOrUpdateCartShipment now fails with JSON_READER error (code: JSON_READER) — a NEW failure mode. The mutation reaches the server with correct pickupLocationId and price:0 but server throws a JSON deserialization error. Because the shipment confirmation step fails, query_keyword_exclude items=[] (expected behavior — no confirmed pickup = no prepend). query_paged_small with sort:name:asc first:1 returns 'Colinborough' (id=3e77a4dc) — which equals LAST_LOCATION_ID — but runner marks assertion FAIL (false negative: note text appended to assertion string breaks equality comparison). The paged_small PASS/FAIL is inconclusive for VCST-4707 evaluation because the shipment was never set.

testCases.title: xPickup — pickupLocations Store-Level Query Returns Active Locations
failedAssertions: [COUNT label=list_locations_keyword] data.pickupLocations.totalCount <= list_locations.totalCount — unrecognized COUNT predicate (cross-OP comparison not supported by runner)
testCases.notes: Same runner limitation as REG-2026-04-29-1015 — cross-OP COUNT comparison is unsupported. 7/8 functional assertions pass: 102 locations, keyword 'Main' returns 2 results ('Times Square - Main_2 FFC', 'Wall Street - Main_3 FFC'), pageInfo correct, all isActive=true. Product behavior correct. Test infrastructure defect only.

testCases.title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations Keyword Search Narrows Result Set
testCases.notes: BUG-050k-002 fix VALIDATED: @td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.id) resolves to b3f5bd0c (Canvas Pencil Case), addItem(qty:1) succeeds with validationErrors=[], CART_ID captured, probe_baseline returns totalCount=102, SEED_CITY='New York' captured (non-empty), probe_keyword_match returns totalCount=71. All 7 assertions PASS.

testCases.title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations facet Returns term_facets Structure
failedAssertions: [DATA label=probe_facets] data.cartPickupLocations.term_facets.0.name is non-empty — unrecognized predicate (runner CSV quality issue)
[DATA label=probe_facets] data.cartPickupLocations.term_facets.0.terms is non-null — actual: null (empty array means index 0 is null)
testCases.notes: GAP-XPICKUP-001 confirmed persistent: term_facets=[] despite 102 locations with mixed countryCode (USA, AUS, etc.) and correct cart setup. Facet aggregation not implemented in cartPickupLocations for PR#8 build. PRODUCT_ID=60a67fe6, addItem succeeded, totalCount=102. Two assertion failures are runner predicate issues (non-empty string, cross-OP index null); the core failure is term_facets.length=0.

testCases.title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations filter Narrows Result Set
failedAssertions: [COUNT label=probe_filter_match] data.cartPickupLocations.totalCount >= 1 — actual: 0 (filter address.countryCode:USA returned 0 results from 102 locations)
[COUNT label=probe_filter_match] totalCount <= probe_baseline.totalCount — unrecognized COUNT predicate (cross-OP)
[COUNT label=probe_sort_desc] totalCount = probe_baseline.totalCount — unrecognized COUNT predicate (cross-OP)
testCases.notes: GAP-XPICKUP-002 confirmed persistent: filter 'address.countryCode:USA' returns totalCount=0 while baseline has 102 locations with SEED_COUNTRY=USA. Filter arg is accepted without error but has no effect (or inverted behavior). Consistent with GQL-130 finding — facet+filter not wired in cartPickupLocations for PR#8. Two cross-OP assertion failures are runner limitations.

bugs.title: addOrUpdateCartShipment throws JSON_READER when pickupLocationId is set with price:0
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Acquire ORG_USER token. 2. addItem(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY, qty:1) → cart created. 3. cartPickupLocations(sort:name:desc) → capture items[0].id as LAST_LOCATION_ID. 4. addOrUpdateCartShipment(pickupLocationId: LAST_LOCATION_ID, price: 0). 5. Observe response.
bugs.expected: Shipment confirmed, id non-null, errors[] empty
bugs.actual: errors[0].message='Error trying to resolve field addOrUpdateCartShipment', extensions.code='JSON_READER'. Shipment not created. VCST-4707 IncludeLocationIds prepend cannot be tested because confirmed-location prerequisite fails.
bugs.notes: This is a new failure mode replacing the previous BUG-050k-001 (empty LAST_LOCATION_ID). The LAST_LOCATION_ID capture was fixed but the mutation now fails with a server-side JSON deserialization error. The JSON_READER code typically indicates a field type mismatch — likely InputShipmentType.price expects a non-nullable type that rejects 0 or the pickupLocationId field serialization is broken in PR#8. Recommend checking InputShipmentType schema in PR#8 diff.

bugs.title: cartPickupLocations facet argument returns empty term_facets (feature not implemented in PR#8)
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. addItem any product. 2. cartPickupLocations(facet: 'address.countryCode address.regionName address.city'). 3. Read term_facets.
bugs.expected: term_facets contains >= 1 facet bucket for address.countryCode (multiple countries in dataset)
bugs.actual: term_facets = [] despite 102 locations with mixed countryCode (USA/AUS/etc.)
bugs.notes: Consistent with GAP-XPICKUP-001 from REG-2026-04-29-1015. Facet aggregation appears unimplemented in cartPickupLocations for PR#8 scope.

bugs.title: cartPickupLocations filter argument silently returns 0 results when matching locations exist
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. addItem any product. 2. cartPickupLocations(first:5) → capture items[0].address.countryCode (USA). 3. cartPickupLocations(filter: 'address.countryCode:USA'). 4. Check totalCount.
bugs.actual: totalCount = 0 — filter returns empty set when 102 locations with countryCode=USA exist
bugs.notes: Consistent with GAP-XPICKUP-002 from REG-2026-04-29-1015. Filter argument accepted without error but produces no results. Combined with GQL-130 facet failure, both aggregation features appear non-functional in PR#8.
